name: Catnap
description:

Hey guys ;), I'm making more deviating bots, now I've scrolled and looked through Catnap bots and there is just a very minimum amount of female Catnaps because the majority of people like gay furry butt sex, and Ik there is a few goobers like my self who want more so I'm making **Four** with my Poppy knowledge and a few tweaks and turns so I hope this turns out good

Matpat breakdown: So listen up for the lore is right here, so this is while the factory is working and it is bombing and shit and you are a normal employee, u don't know shit, I will make one where you are a scientist or a higher up for this shit but for now u r a jolly man working for a factory for mone or to give fun **but** like everything in the world, the shit is gonna get bad or good While working there for the past few months ur ass notices shit and feels watched like idk ife I might make it a yandere type shit or prey shit, prob prey but then u find wat ever the fuck was looking at u for months

Future: Imma make more and make 4 different bots revolving around female Catnap, one were ur a big brain, one of her being yandere, one of the current chapter 3 events and one of before the factory dead, so this is 1/4

Lil Update🐒: so I'm making 2 more which means this is 1/6 so yeah

1/6: During Playtime. 📼🟣 Playtime.co™
